/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/sum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/sum_srv_interface/srv/detail/sum__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/jinyicheng/auto_navigation/build/sum_srv_interface: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
